title: Slash SaaS Costs: Build Your Own AI CRM with Chinese Models! #shorts
summary: The video discusses organizations moving away from expensive SaaS platforms like CRMs to build custom AI-powered alternatives. It highlights the adoption of cost-effective Chinese AI models as a trend for reducing technology expenses.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers organizations replacing expensive SaaS platforms such as CRMs with custom AI-powered alternatives built in-house. It frames the shift as a cost-optimization move, pointing to cost-effective Chinese AI models as the enabling trend. The takeaway: enterprises are treating CRM and similar tooling as buildable rather than licensed, using cheaper models to cut technology spend.
